ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the category (e.g., TOP, BOT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the chart belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the chart is applicable to */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range the chart covers (e.g., XXS-XXL) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement corresponds to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production team, quality control) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., design, production, quality control) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chart */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, Asia) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region (e.g., US, EU, AS) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurements" (
  "product_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the product corresponds to */,
  "product_measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the product measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., measurement, product) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
